shots.keyframe_moment: 全景幼儿园建筑和豪车
shots.reasoning_brief: Visual-only establishing shot of kindergarten exterior; no characters, dialogue, or props; scene_name suffices for location.

shots.keyframe_moment: 沈念歌牵着予予站在门口
shots.reasoning_brief: Visual shot of mother and child at entrance; other parents in background but not foreground; no dialogue or states.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: EXTRA_PARENT
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 这个人怎么进的星辉？赞助费一年二十万，她穿得像刚从菜市场来的。

shots.keyframe_moment: 风衣妈妈牵女儿走来瞥一眼
shots.reasoning_brief: Dialogue to unidentified friend; listener not in characters, so descriptive; action glance at target but not direct; no props or states.
Visual reaction shot; hears dialogue from prior but no new; no body overlay as psychological.
Transition visual; no dialogue; entering building shifts to interior later.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 妈咪，你在想什么？

shots.reasoning_brief: Child speaks to mother; gaze specified; still at entrance per context.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 在想予予今天要好好表现。

shots.reasoning_brief: Mother responds to child; no states.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 放心吧！我最厉害了！

shots.reasoning_brief: Child boasts to mother; scene_name still entrance but context entering.

shots.keyframe_moment: 教室全景，孩子们和家长坐圈
shots.reasoning_brief: Shift to interior classroom; multiple extras implied; no specific count, but foreground several; no dialogue.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: EXTRA_TEACHER
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 今天是我们中班的第一天，请小朋友们轮流做自我介绍好不好？先说名字，再说一个关于自己的秘密。

shots.reasoning_brief: Teacher addresses group; listener collective.
Montage of children; cardinality approximate as 'ten several'; no specific dialogue.

character_state_overlays.evidence_quote: 他站起来，背带裤的背带松了一边，头发有点翘。但站得很直。
character_state_overlays.body_state: loose overall strap and tousled hair

shots.reasoning_brief: Visual of child standing; overlay for visible dishevelment affecting appearance.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 大家好，我叫沈知予。小名予予。

character_state_overlays.evidence_quote: 背带裤的背带松了一边，头发有点翘。

shots.reasoning_brief: Introduction to class; state continues from prior shot.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: EXTRA_TEACHER
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 予予的秘密是什么呀？

shots.reasoning_brief: Teacher questions child directly.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 我爸爸是这个城市最厉害的人。但我还没见过他。等我找到他，他会变得很厉害。

shots.reasoning_brief: Child's key line to group; state visible in moment.

shots.keyframe_moment: 家长们互相看，风衣妈妈笑
shots.reasoning_brief: Reaction shot of parents; no dialogue.
Mother's tense reaction; no overlay as not physiological.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: EXTRA_TEACHER
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 予予的爸爸一定很了不起。那你有没有什么爱好呢？

shots.reasoning_brief: Teacher to child.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 我喜欢画画。还有数学。100以内的加减法我都能算。

character_state_overlays.evidence_quote: 背带裤的背带松了一边

shots.reasoning_brief: Child to teacher; state persists.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: EXTRA_TEACHER
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 真的吗？那老师考考你。37加58等于多少？

shots.reasoning_brief: Teacher challenges child.
Quick answer; posture from context.
Reaction visuals; no dialogue.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 这个很简单呀。

shots.reasoning_brief: Child's cute remark; overlay for visible expression.

shots.keyframe_moment: 家长表情变化，有人掏手机
shots.reasoning_brief: Group reaction; prop new, no handoff.
Mother's subtle reaction; psychological, no overlay.
Time shift to evening; no characters foreground.

shots.location_evidence: nearby_context line 87: △ 沈念歌站在路边，等公交车。
shots.reasoning_brief: Specific location for bus wait; more precise than scene_name.
Child exiting kindergarten.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 妈咪！今天老师说我是全班最聪明的！还给我多发了一颗小星星！

shots.reasoning_brief: Child to mother.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 真棒。

shots.reasoning_brief: Mother praises child.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 妈咪，我告诉你一个秘密。

shots.reasoning_brief: Child to mother.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 什么秘密？

shots.reasoning_brief: Mother asks child.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 我今天在幼儿园走廊上看到一张照片。挂在荣誉墙上。一个穿西装的男人，下面写着'陆氏集团总裁陆景琛先生捐赠'。妈咪——就是医院的那个叔叔！
dialogue_annotations.gaze_rule: 左右看了看，凑到她耳边

shots.reasoning_brief: Child whispers to mother; maps '西装男人' to LU_JINGCHEN_MAIN via alias.
Close-up reaction; no dialogue.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 嗯……可能是吧。

shots.reasoning_brief: Mother to child.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 我就知道！他就住在这个城市！妈咪，你今天不是去他上班的地方了吗？你有没有看到他？

shots.reasoning_brief: Child excited to mother.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 走了，公交车来了。

shots.reasoning_brief: Transition to bus; specific location.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 妈咪，他既然捐赠了幼儿园，说明他是个好人。好人的话，应该不会不认自己的儿子吧？
dialogue_annotations.gaze_rule: 被牵着上了车，还在回头看着幼儿园的方向

shots.location_evidence: nearby_context line 111: 被牵着上了车
shots.reasoning_brief: On bus; child to mother.

shots.location_evidence: nearby_context line 113: 公交车台阶上
shots.reasoning_brief: Close-up back; no answer.

shots.location_evidence: nearby_context line 117: 公交车关门，驶远了。
shots.reasoning_brief: Bus departing; no characters.

shots.keyframe_moment: 赵一鸣在车内持通讯录
shots.reasoning_brief: Assistant in car; prop new.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: LU_JINGCHEN_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 查到了吗？

shots.reasoning_brief: Phone call; voiceover no listener in frame, but addressee assistant; no visual for speaker.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: ZHAO_YIMING_ASSISTANT
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 查到了。陆总，那个孩子……确实在星辉。今天第一天入园。

shots.reasoning_brief: Assistant speaks to boss on phone; prop continuation.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: LU_JINGCHEN_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 他今天说了什么？

shots.reasoning_brief: Boss asks via phone.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: ZHAO_YIMING_ASSISTANT
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 他说……'我爸爸是这个城市最厉害的人。但还没见过他。'

shots.reasoning_brief: Assistant relays child's words.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: LU_JINGCHEN_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: ……知道了。

shots.reasoning_brief: Boss responds softly.
Assistant sighs; prop continues.

music_cues: 吉他轻拨，一丝暖意中带着悬念
shots.reasoning_brief: Closing visual; music from nearby_context line 143; no characters.
